response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two distinct songs based on the visual cues and title cards on screen. Song 1 is 'Kyou mo Dai-tensai!' (今日も大天才っ！) and Song 2 is 'Star Star Start' (スタースタースタート).
2. Identified Ichijou Ririka as the main performer for both songs, with Tokino Sora appearing as a guest performer for the second song.
3. Used the on-screen credit '作詞・作曲・編曲：ナユタン星人' to identify NayutalieN as the creator for both songs.
4. Performed web searches for both songs adding 'lyrics' to confirm titles and find translations. Found lyrics on Genius, Uta-Net, and MatchLyric.
5. Structured the findings into the required JSON format, mapping the timestamps, descriptions, and lyrics for both scenes.
response.global_summary: The video features a two-song live performance by VTuber Ichijou Ririka, with Tokino Sora joining for the second song. The first song is "Kyou mo Dai-tensai!" (今日も大天才っ！), and the second song is "Star Star Start" (スタースタースタート).

scenes.description: Ichijou Ririka performs "Kyou mo Dai-tensai!" on a virtual stage.
scenes.song_title: Kyou mo Dai-tensai! (今日も大天才っ！)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
今日も大天才っ！ 
(大優勝！ 中毒！ 重症！) 
今日も大天才っ！ 
あ〜ずっともっと 推し事させてっ ね？ 
アクスタ・痛バ・ぬい 準備万端！ 
オシャレも気合い入れちゃって 
「誰の為なの〜？」 
なんて…そんなの言えないや
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A great genius today (A big win! Addicted! Severe!) 
A great genius today 
Ah, I've been giving it a lot more of a favorite, right? 
The acrylic stand, the ita-bag, the plushie—all ready! 
Even the fashion is high-energy 
"Who is this for?" 
I don't know, but it's just too much! Love you!

scenes.description: Ichijou Ririka and Tokino Sora perform "Star Star Start" (スタースタースタート) on stage together.
scenes.song_title: Star Star Start (スタースタースタート)
scenes.performer_in_video: Ichijou Ririka (一条莉々華), Tokino Sora (ときのそら)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(フッフー！) (フーワッフーワッ！) 
我らの宇宙のはじまりは (パパヤ…) 
触れた瞬間 (アララララ…) 
あぁ、スタースタースタートしたこのラブは 
あなたがいなきゃいまごろ超新星 
(スター・スター・スタート！) 
そして星が生まれまして (パパヤ…) 
明け方のいちばん星も (パパヤ…) 
あぁ、あなたと出会った 
これは次元を言えるガス大発見！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Fuh-hoo!) (Foo-wah-foo-wah!) 
The beginning of our universe is (Papaya!) 
The moment we touched (Ara-la-la-la!) 
Ah, this love that started as a star-star-start 
If you weren't here, I'd be a supernova by now 
(Star-star-start!) 
And then, stars are born (Papaya!)

Ah, I met you
